summary: P4 New Features testing complete. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified all 3 new features: P0 Prediction Accuracy System, P1 Opportunity Radar Live Feed, P2 Saturation Radar.

issues: Mixed content warning - notifications API called with HTTP instead of HTTPS (console error). This doesn't affect the features being tested but should be fixed.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/outcomes/prediction-accuracy requires auth (returns 401/403)
Backend: GET /api/outcomes/prediction-accuracy returns accuracy_pct, sample_size, successful_predictions, failed_predictions, score_buckets, insights, insufficient_data
Backend: Score buckets have correct structure (range, total, success, success_rate) with valid ranges: 80+, 60-79, 40-59, <40
Backend: Insights have correct structure (text, bucket)
Backend: GET /api/radar/live-events requires auth (returns 401/403)
Backend: GET /api/radar/live-events returns events array, total count, generated_at timestamp
Backend: Each radar event has type, title, detail, product_id, product_name, image_url, launch_score, trend_stage, timestamp
Backend: Event types are valid (trend_spike, new_ads, supplier_demand, competition_drop)
Backend: limit parameter works correctly on live-events
Backend: GET /api/products/{product_id}/saturation is public (no auth required)
Backend: Saturation returns 404 for non-existent product
Backend: Saturation returns saturation_score (0-100), risk_level (Low/Medium/High), stores_detected, ads_detected, search_growth, trend_stage, signals object
Backend: Saturation score is valid range (0-100)
Backend: Risk level is valid enum (Low/Medium/High)
Backend: Signals object contains stores, ads, search, trend with value and label
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Outcomes' link in sidebar navigation
Frontend: Dashboard shows PredictionAccuracyCard (data-testid='prediction-accuracy') with accuracy 33.3%, 1 correct, 2 failed predictions
Frontend: Dashboard shows OpportunityRadarFeed (data-testid='opportunity-radar') with LIVE badge, auto-refresh indicator, 14 events
Frontend: Radar events show badges: Ad Activity, Demand Jump, Low Competition
Frontend: Product detail page shows SaturationRadar (data-testid='saturation-radar')
Frontend: SaturationRadar shows risk level badge (data-testid='saturation-risk-level'): Low Risk
Frontend: SaturationRadar shows saturation score (data-testid='saturation-score'): 27/100
Frontend: SaturationRadar shows signal rows: Stores detected (8), Active ads detected (0), Search growth (Declining), Trend stage
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Notifications API appears to be called with HTTP instead of HTTPS in some cases (console mixed content warning)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P4 features testing complete. Three new features verified: (1) P0 Prediction Accuracy - GET /api/outcomes/prediction-accuracy returns accuracy stats based on tracked outcomes. Dashboard shows PredictionAccuracyCard with data-testid='prediction-accuracy'. (2) P1 Opportunity Radar - GET /api/radar/live-events returns live signal events. Dashboard shows OpportunityRadarFeed with data-testid='opportunity-radar', LIVE badge, 30s auto-refresh. (3) P2 Saturation Radar - GET /api/products/{id}/saturation is a PUBLIC endpoint (no auth). Product detail page shows SaturationRadar with data-testid='saturation-radar'. Previous tests: iteration_28 (AI Co-Pilot), iteration_29 (P1/P2), iteration_30 (P3 Outcomes).

returns.score_buckets: array with range, total, success, success_rate

returns.signals: object with stores, ads, search, trend
